metadata.description: Vary n = #sub-context labels used to fit BOTH u_sub(n) AND d_sub(n); at each n compare the LABELED dense fair gate (DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED-FAIR) vs the n-INDEPENDENT LABEL-FREE SAE absorber handle (KG-ABL) on (i) localization gate balanced-accuracy on a held-out eval fold ($0, K_LOC label resamples) and (ii) edit quality = forget x preservation at matched meaningful forget (2 judges, large/Amazon, K_EDIT resamples). Decide whether the iter-8 full-label MATCH survives label scarcity.
metadata.sae_handle_label_caveat: The SAE handle uses ZERO sub-context labels AT REFIT TIME (the absorber latent id is fixed/discovered once); so the curve is FLAT in n. The absorber was discovered with labels in prior iterations -> the handle is amortized/transferable label-free at deployment, NOT zero-label end-to-end.
metadata.dense_supervision: the n sub-context labels fit BOTH u_sub(n) (erase direction) and d_sub(n) (gate)
metadata.gate_balacc_metric: balanced accuracy of the WHERE-to-gate detector on the FROZEN disjoint eval fold
metadata.edit_metric: joint Q = HM(forget_quality, preservation); adv = Q_SAE - Q_fair(n); paired-bootstrap CI over PRES prompts. adv_pres (preservation-only) is the iter-8-comparable cross-check.

iter8_anchor.note: adv_pres(full) CI should INCLUDE 0 here (fair gate matched at full labels).

examples.input: [localization|first_letter_large|gate_balacc] SAE label-free absorber-firing handle (n-independent)
[localization|first_letter_large|recall_hole_recovery] SAE absorber recovers the parent recall-hole on X
[localization|first_letter_large|gate_balacc] DENSE fair d_sub-gate fit on n=1 sub-context labels
[localization|first_letter_large|gate_balacc] DENSE fair d_sub-gate fit on n=5 sub-context labels
[localization|first_letter_large|gate_balacc] DENSE fair d_sub-gate fit on n=full sub-context labels
[edit|first_letter_large|edit_joint_adv] KG-ABL (label-free SAE handle) vs DENSE fair gate fit on n=1 labels, at MATCHED meaningful forget
[edit|first_letter_large|edit_joint_adv] KG-ABL (label-free SAE handle) vs DENSE fair gate fit on n=5 labels, at MATCHED meaningful forget
[edit|first_letter_large|edit_joint_adv] KG-ABL (label-free SAE handle) vs DENSE fair gate fit on n=full labels, at MATCHED meaningful forget
